loopRule: Measure -> choose earliest unfinished phase -> implement one reversible slice -> verify full pipeline -> write status report -> repeat.

goals.name: Champion skill gameplay/balance literals are removed
goals.nextFocus: Convert remaining champion skill gameplay literals to generated ServerPrivate gameplay atoms, then delete fallback constants only after readers are data-backed.

goals.name: Gameplay authority no longer reads visual timing/yaw fields
goals.nextFocus: Split action timing from visual timing. Server/GameSim keeps action lock/window facts, ClientPublic owns animation/cast/recovery/yaw presentation facts.

goals.name: Bot AI tactics and skill-rank policy are data-owned
goals.nextFocus: Move ChampionAIPolicy profile, combo, and bot skill-rank constants to ServerPrivate AI definition data.

goals.name: Minion, wave, jungle, structure, and placement game values are data-owned
goals.nextFocus: Move object combat, wave timing, jungle, structure, turret, and placement fallback values into ServerPrivate object/map data.

goals.name: Network identity uses stable DefinitionKey boundaries
goals.nextFocus: Add stable DefinitionKey paths for command/snapshot boundaries and remove dense pack-local champion id assumptions from network contracts.

goals.name: Legacy value owner paths have no runtime readers
goals.nextFocus: After reader count reaches zero, delete ChampionGameDataDB value ownership, ChampionStatsRegistry defaults, ChampionRuntimeDefaults defaults, SkillTable, ChampionTable, and remaining fallback tables.

completionDefinition: All goals have currentCount <= targetMax and the full verification command passes.
